name: Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1-14 jalapeno peppers, minced and seeded (adjust quantity based on desired heat level)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop vegetables.
2. Boil the chopped vegetables until thickened (about three hours).
3. Stir in cornstarch and boil for an additional 15 minutes.
4. Adjust seasoning as desired before serving with brown rice, if preferred.
5. Enjoy your homemade salsa!
